full_text:
He Yong (Boqiu) 何顒 (伯求)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
He Yong (何顒), styledBoqiu (伯求), was born in Nanyang. Recognised Cao Cao and Xun Yu as men who could deal with the troubles. He Yong was affiliated with the Han Dynasty and Dong Zhuo. He Yong lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
